title: lithospermum exsertum
intro: Lithospermum exsertum, also known as Chinese blue forget-me-not, is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithospermum exsertum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Lithospermum exsertum is often prepared as a herbal tea or capsule, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a component of various formulas to treat various health conditions.
